Encapsulated PostScript File Format 3: Set priority over new format fmt/501 PostScript 3.1

JTIP (JPEG Tiled Image Pyramid): Removed .jpg as an external signature to avoid 'false-positive' identification of files with a .jpg extension which do not match any known binary signatures. This means that JPEG files that do not conform to any known signature will no longer incorrectly default to JTIP.
Microsoft Excel for Windows 2007 Onwards: Improved descriptive information at suggestion of Chris Rusbridge, linking this entry explicitly to fmt/189 - Microsoft Office Open XML.
Microsoft Powerpoint for Windows 2007 Onwards: Improved descriptive information at suggestion of Chris Rusbridge, linking this entry explicitly to fmt/189 - Microsoft Office Open XML.

Video Object File (MPEG-2 subset): Renamed from 'Video Object File'. Provided further descriptive information and improved binary signature through PRONOM Research.
Silicon Graphics Image: Added .rgb as an external signature.
Stats+ Data File: Removed .css as an external signature to remove multiple identification clashes with Cascading Style Sheet.
Kodak PhotoCD Image 1.0: PUID deprecated in favour of fmt/211 - Kodak Photo CD as PRONOM Research found this to be the same format.
